vibe: Authority, clarity, and data-driven intelligence mixed with a premium, guided advisor feel.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.dashboard_widgets: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] p-6 flex flex-col h-full
surface_strategies.viability_score_card: relative overflow-hidden border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-[#F8F9FA] p-8

component_instructions.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary CTA: bg-[#0033A0] text-white hover:bg-[#002277]. Secondary: border border-[#0F172A] text-[#0F172A] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#0F172A] hover:text-white.
component_instructions.readiness_quiz: 1 question per screen. Massive typography for the question (h2 size). Large, selectable blocks for answers. Minimal UI, high focus.
component_instructions.franchise_compare: Use 'Control Room' Grid layout. High-density data table or bento grid with 1px borders. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers/scores.
component_instructions.ai_explainer: Floating glassmorphic side-panel or inline chat block with a soft shadow and distinct 1px border. Use typing indicators.
component_instructions.roadmap: Vertical stepper layout with thick vertical lines (2px border-l). Bold markers.
component_instructions.owner_dashboard: Strict Swiss grid. Minimalist. Top navigation, data cards taking full width or 1/3 columns. Data tables using Shadcn UI without card wrappers.

hero_background.description: Abstract glass building, used for landing page hero section with a light gradient overlay.

location_intelligence_bg.description: Aerial view of Chennai, used in the location intelligence page/section.

subtle_pattern.description: Subtle grid pattern texture, use as a repeatable background in the dashboard or compare sections.

franchise_coffee.description: Coffee shop interior, representative image for Tea/Coffee category.

franchise_pharmacy.description: Modern pharmacy interior, representative image for Pharmacy category.

franchise_carcare.description: Empty car wash stall, representative image for Car Care category.

franchise_food.description: Cooking food close up, representative image for Shawarma/BBQ/Biryani.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Prioritize clarity, minimal borders, and sharp, boxy layouts over rounded, soft shadows.
Never use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is loaded via Google Fonts or custom import.
In the Readiness Quiz, use large typography and massive clickable cards. Build it as a wizard with 1 question per view.
For the Viability Score, utilize color coding strictly: Green (#10B981) for Safe, Yellow (#F59E0B) for Moderate, and Red (#EF4444) for Risk.
Do NOT use `transparent` backgrounds for sticky headers. Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70`.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for elegant, thin-line iconography.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements for testing purposes.
When displaying the Franchise Roadmap, use a clear vertical timeline with bold connection lines.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, selects, and dialogs, but strip out the default rounded corners (make them sharp) and heavy box-shadows.
